offer: For logistics managers processing 10–20 freight invoices/month, inconsistent payment tracking causes cash flow gaps. We provide weekly payment status summaries instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent payment tracking leads to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics managers
Indie Hackers discussions on payment tracking
DM outreach to logistics managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing logistics tools
try_it: Let users try the dashboard and summary email on 1-3 invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
